File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/virtualmachines/details/tabs/metrics/NetworkCharts/NetworkCharts.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 48
Rule [family:Select]:
## Select Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Select activeItemId={...} activeMenu={...} containsDrilldown={...} containsFlyout={...} drilldownItemPath={...} drilledInMenus={...} focusTimeoutDelay={...} id={...}>
    <SelectList isAriaMultiselectable={...}>
      <SelectOption actions={...} component={...} description={...} direction={...} download={...} drilldownMenu={...} flyoutMenu={...} hasCheckbox={...}>
        <SelectList />
        <Select />
      </SelectOption>
    </SelectList>
    <SelectGroup innerRef={...} label={...} labelHeadingLevel={...} titleId={...} />
  </Select>
```

Props that stay on <Select>: activeItemId, activeMenu, containsDrilldown, containsFlyout, drilldownItemPath, drilledInMenus, focusTimeoutDelay, id, innerRef, isMenuDrilledIn, isNavFlyout, isOpen, isPlain, isRootMenu, isScrollable, maxMenuHeight, menuHeight, onActionClick, onDrillIn, onDrillOut, onGetMenuHeight, onOpenChange, onOpenChangeKeys, onSelect, onToggleKeydown, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, parentMenu, popperProps, role, selected, shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen, shouldFocusToggleOnSelect, shouldPreventScrollOnItemFocus, toggle, variant, zIndex

Add imports: SelectGroup, SelectList, SelectOption from '@patternfly/react-core'

Prop type changes:

  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions

  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:

    old: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void

### Fix 2
Line: 45
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-dropdown]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-dropdown' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-dropdown' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu

Code context:
```
   44          selected={selectedNetwork}
   45          toggleProps={{ className: 'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' }}
   46        >

```

### Fix 3
Line: 45
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-dropdown-menu]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-dropdown__menu' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu

Code context:
```
   44          selected={selectedNetwork}
   45          toggleProps={{ className: 'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' }}
   46        >

```

### Fix 4
Line: 45
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-dropdown]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-dropdown' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-dropdown' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu

Code context:
```
   44          selected={selectedNetwork}
   45          toggleProps={{ className: 'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' }}
   46        >

```

### Fix 5
Line: 45
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-dropdown-menu]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-dropdown__menu' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu

Code context:
```
   44          selected={selectedNetwork}
   45          toggleProps={{ className: 'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' }}
   46        >

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/virtualmachines/details/tabs/metrics/NetworkCharts/NetworkCharts.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 48):** `SelectOption` must be wrapped in `SelectList` per v6 composition rules. Currently, `SelectOption` elements are direct children of `FormPFSelect`. I need to wrap them in `<SelectList>`. I also need to add `SelectList` to the import.

**Fix 2, 3, 4, 5 (Line 45):** All four fixes target the same line — the `toggleProps={{ className: 'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu' }}`. The CSS classes `pf-v5-c-dropdown` and `pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` are removed with no v6 equivalent. The className string is `'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu'`. I need to remove the dead CSS class references. The `network` part appears to be a custom class, so I'll keep that. The `ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` part uses the removed classes and should be removed.

Let me look at what `FormPFSelect` is to understand the context better:

Good — `FormPFSelect` is a wrapper around the v6 `<Select>`. It passes `children` directly into `<Select>`. So the `SelectOption` elements from our file become direct children of `<Select>`, which violates the v6 composition rule that `SelectOption` must be inside `SelectList`.

Now let me apply all fixes:

**Fix 1:** Wrap the `SelectOption` elements in `<SelectList>` and add `SelectList` to the import.

**Fixes 2-5:** Remove the dead CSS classes from `toggleProps`. The className `'network ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu'` contains:
- `network` — a custom class (keep)
- `ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` — this is a CSS selector-style string using the removed class. Remove it, keep just `network`.
Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. Let me verify the structure is sound:

1. **Line 9:** `SelectList` added to the import alongside `SelectOption` and `Title`.
2. **Line 45:** The dead CSS classes `ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` removed, keeping only the custom `network` class.
3. **Lines 47-63:** `SelectOption` elements are now wrapped inside `<SelectList>`.
4. All indentation is consistent and the JSX structure is valid.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Description |
|-----|------|--------|-------------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-cf-select-option-in-list` (family:Select) | ✅ Applied | Wrapped `<SelectOption>` elements in `<SelectList>` (lines 47-63) and added `SelectList` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import (line 9). This satisfies the v6 Select composition requirement that `SelectOption` must be inside `SelectList`. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-dropdown` | ✅ Applied | Removed the `pf-v5-c-dropdown` reference (part of `ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu`) from `toggleProps.className` on line 45, keeping only the custom `network` class. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-dropdown-menu` | ✅ Applied | Removed the `pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` reference from `toggleProps.className` on line 45 (same edit as Fix 2 — both classes were in the same string). |
| Fix 4 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-dropdown` | ✅ Applied | Same removal as Fix 2 — the `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class has no v6 equivalent and was removed. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-dropdown-menu` | ✅ Applied | Same removal as Fix 3 — the `pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` class has no v6 equivalent and was removed. |

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. Let me verify the structure is sound:

1. **Line 9:** `SelectList` added to the import alongside `SelectOption` and `Title`.
2. **Line 45:** The dead CSS classes `ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` removed, keeping only the custom `network` class.
3. **Lines 47-63:** `SelectOption` elements are now wrapped inside `<SelectList>`.
4. All indentation is consistent and the JSX structure is valid.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Description |
|-----|------|--------|-------------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-cf-select-option-in-list` (family:Select) | ✅ Applied | Wrapped `<SelectOption>` elements in `<SelectList>` (lines 47-63) and added `SelectList` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import (line 9). This satisfies the v6 Select composition requirement that `SelectOption` must be inside `SelectList`. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-dropdown` | ✅ Applied | Removed the `pf-v5-c-dropdown` reference (part of `ul.pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu`) from `toggleProps.className` on line 45, keeping only the custom `network` class. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-dropdown-menu` | ✅ Applied | Removed the `pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` reference from `toggleProps.className` on line 45 (same edit as Fix 2 — both classes were in the same string). |
| Fix 4 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-dropdown` | ✅ Applied | Same removal as Fix 2 — the `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class has no v6 equivalent and was removed. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-dropdown-menu` | ✅ Applied | Same removal as Fix 3 — the `pf-v5-c-dropdown__menu` class has no v6 equivalent and was removed. |
